bead.title: Fix clippy str_split_at_newline warning in axon-audit/src/cdc.rs
bead.description:
crates/axon-audit/src/cdc.rs:584 triggers a str_split_at_newline clippy lint that fails CI's -D warnings gate. This was introduced by the FEAT-021 KafkaCdcSink commit (axon-be2a06cc) and is unrelated to the kafka feature flag — it fires on a plain string split in the non-kafka code path.

Find the offending call at line 584 and fix the lint: either use the recommended replacement method suggested by clippy, or restructure the string operation to avoid the pattern. Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings after the fix to confirm clean.
bead.acceptance: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings passes with zero warnings; the specific lint at crates/axon-audit/src/cdc.rs:584 is resolved; cargo test --workspace still passes
